data.title: Baja California Sur raises Embrace It program fee to 488 pesos for international visitors as of Jan 1, 2026; funds for various projects. (Character count: 137)
data.description: Starting January 1, 2026, the Embrace It program in Baja California Sur has been increased from 470 to 488 pesos per individual. These funds will be specifically designated for initiatives related to environmental preservation, enhancing tourism infrastructure, and supporting social and cultural programs. data.title: Inventor from Lincoln, Calif. creates ROCK LOCK - adjustable radius arm for trucks. Enhances suspension systems.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Lincoln, California shared the creation of the ROCK LOCK, a modified radius arm tailored for enhancing the suspension system in modern super duty trucks. This innovative product offers adjustability to provide either increased flexibility or stability for the trucks. The invention is set to revolutionize the suspension setup of super duty trucks, promising improved performance and driving experience.

data.title: SEC Chair Atkins optimistic about new crypto market structure bill in 2026, expecting pivotal week for regulation. Legislation aims to clarify regulatory authority and protect investors, reducing uncertainty in the industry. President Trump's goal is to support innovation and prevent regulatory overreach.
data.description: Chairman Paul Atkins of the Securities and Exchange Commission remarked that the upcoming week may prove crucial for crypto regulation, with Congress making progress on legislation to clarify the U.S. crypto market. In a Fox Business interview, Atkins stated that lawmakers are nearing passage of bipartisan legislation defining regulatory jurisdiction between the SEC and the CFTC. The proposed bill aims to lessen regulatory ambiguity, safeguard investors, and establish clearer guidelines for the crypto sector. Atkins emphasized the legislation's importance in averting excessive regulation, fostering innovation, and furthering President Donald Trump's objectives.

data.title: North American Sustainable Refrigeration Council opens registration for Spring 2026 Natural Refrigeration Training Summit in New York for free.
data.description: The North American Sustainable Refrigeration Council has announced the registration opening for a free Natural Refrigerant Training Summit in New York State. The event signifies the debut of the summit in the state and offers participants the opportunity to learn about sustainable refrigeration practices. This initiative aims to promote environmental awareness and education regarding natural refrigerants.

data.title: Nox Group promotes executives, organizes team for growing demand of industrial facilities nationwide.
data.description: Nox Group, a leading hyper-scale industrial construction company based in Phoenix, recently revealed a significant series of changes within its executive team and organizational structure. The adjustments are aimed at accommodating the increasing demand for critical industrial facilities such as data centers, semiconductor plants, and water infrastructure throughout the country. Notably growing in Arizona, Nox Group has implemented a revamped leadership framework to enhance its operations and support its expansion.

data.title: Remodel Health partners with UKG to simplify ICHRA administration using HR and payroll data sync. - 97 characters
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Remodel Health announced an integration aimed at streamlining ICHRA administration by syncing HR and payroll data. This integration is expected to simplify the process of managing Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangements. Remodel Health, a prominent provider of ICHRA solutions, unveiled this initiative to enhance efficiency and convenience for businesses. This technology update demonstrates a commitment to optimizing benefits administration and is poised to revolutionize how companies handle health reimbursements. With this integration, businesses can expect a more seamless and automated approach to managing ICHRA, potentially saving them time and resources in the process.

data.title: Lone River Ranch Water partners with Diamond Cross Ranch for outdoor Après Ski Collection in Jackson Hole, Wyo.
data.description: A popular hard seltzer brand, Lone River, known for its Ranch Water in a can, has launched a new collection in collaboration with Diamond in Jackson Hole, Wyoming. The brand, originating from Texas, emphasizes movement, fresh air, and outdoor leisure in its latest line. This partnership brings a refreshing twist to the iconic Jackson Hole ranch. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026, by the brand through PRNewswire.

data.title: Cryptex Finance appoints Canary Capital as strategic advisor for digital asset index products.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Cryptex Finance revealed that Canary Capital has come on board as a strategic advisor as the company moves forward with its plans for publicly traded digital asset index products. Canary Capital will be offering guidance to Cryptex Finance on aspects such as market structure and index construction. This development marks a significant step in the growth of Cryptex Finance as it continues to expand its offerings in the digital asset market.
